arts.ttl: Newcastle United in negotiations with Real Betis – Winter move from Magpies ‘gaining strength’
arts.sum: Newcastle United’s William Osula has emerged as a new target for Real Betis late in the winter market. Real Betis are working on bringing in a striker to provide Manuel Pellegrini options in the attack for the second half of the season.
